creator: litherum@icloud.com
text:
I just hit this today, and I completely disagree that this isn't a bug.

For my particular case, I didn't even install krb5 myself - it was installed as a dependency of vscode. Just because krb5 is installed does *not* mean I want curl to use it.

It should be possible to have both vscode (and therefore krb5) installed, and to have curl use GSSAPI_BASE (which is the default option).
